description: Discover the air quality around you with our easy-to-use APIs. Whether you're planning outdoor activities or just want to know the air quality in your city, our service provides accurate metrics like European AQI and PM2.5/PM10 levels. Use the geocoding feature to search for air quality by city name, making it perfect for travelers and health-conscious individuals. Ideal for environmental researchers, city planners, and anyone interested in maintaining a healthy lifestyle.
